text: Jarvis, what are the calendar items for Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, April 20. No work meetings today. You have Ethan's soccer practice scheduled and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Quick update: Listening to a podcast in the garage. It was a really interesting history episode. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Got it, Mike. Personal time is valuable. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. Enjoy the episode!
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Reading scientific papers late tonight. Building humidity sensors for the greenhouse. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Logged that. I checked the telemetry feeds. ESP32 sensor soldering is a fun project. I can fetch pinout diagrams. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. She was throwing broccoli on the floor demanding fruit snacks. They keep us on our toes.
title: Parenting Update

text: Good planning. Toddler nutrition is a constant negotiation. Blending veggies into sauce works well. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Interesting. I've got the grocery list ready. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan is practicing his piano lessons in the living room. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Got it, Mike. I've got the schedule covered. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. He's doing great with Mrs. Patterson.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, The kitchen sink area has a problem. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Got it, Mike. Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Just wanted to mention that having dinner with our friends tonight. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. Catan is always a good time. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. Let me know if you need any printouts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Ready to relax for the weekend.
title: Personal Update

text: Logged that. Good way to wrap up the day. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, Soldering custom sensors in the garage. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. Space science and tech is a great focus. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Lily is trying to teach Cooper how to sit using training treats. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Screen time is always a negotiation. That's adorable! Cooper is responding well to Lily's positive cues. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Putting together our grocery list. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Looking forward to a good meal.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Got it, Mike. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Just wanted to mention that ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. It's a busy schedule but worth it.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Understood. That's a big step. I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. Go Frisco FC!
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Doing some cleaning around the house. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: We got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Logged that. I've noted the plans. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Relaxing Sunday spending time with Sarah and the kids. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Spent some quality time stargazing with the telescope. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
